about.title: Alex Razbakov
about.intro: Senior fullstack developer based in Munich. I build things that bring people together — through code, through dance, through community. I believe the best technology disappears into the human experience it creates.
about.believe1: Blogging is a complex search query — I write to find my people, not to build an audience. Every post is a signal sent out, hoping someone resonates.
about.believe2: The best products are built by people who care about the humans using them. I'd rather prototype than philosophize, build than speculate, connect than broadcast.
about.doCodeDesc: Vue.js, Nuxt, Firebase, Postgres, Prisma — building web apps that solve real problems.
about.doAIDesc: LangChain, Claude, smart search, workflow automation — making AI useful, not just flashy.
about.doCommunityDesc: 7+ years building WeDance, a platform connecting dancers worldwide.
about.doDanceDesc: Cuban salsa teacher in Munich — bridging cultures through movement and music.
about.photoAtv: ATV ride on sand dunes in Kenya
about.photoCubaMalecon: With friends on the Malecón, Havana
about.photoCubaVintageCar: Inside a pink vintage car in Havana
about.photoCubaHavanaStreet: Classic car on a colorful Havana street
about.factMunich: Living in Munich, Germany — mountains nearby, good coffee everywhere
about.factLanguages: I speak Ukrainian, Russian, German, English, and Spanish
about.factWeDance: Building WeDance for 7+ years — a passion project that became a platform
about.factSciFi: Grew up on sci-fi — still ask 'what if?' about everything
about.factChess: Chess player — I like games where every move matters
about.ctaDescription: Have a project in mind, want to chat about tech, or just want to say hi?

services.title: I help people work smarter with AI
services.subtitle: I run 20+ AI agents daily, built 60+ custom skills, and automate real workflows. Here's how I can help you do the same.

audit.title: AI Workflow Audit
audit.description: A 1-hour deep dive into your workflows. I'll find what's worth automating, what tools fit, and where AI actually saves you time — no fluff, just actionable next steps.
audit.deliverable: Recorded session + written report with quick wins and a long-term automation plan
audit.audience: Founders, team leads, and solopreneurs drowning in manual tasks

agents.title: Custom AI Agents
agents.description: I build AI agents tailored to your specific workflows. From drafting and research to data processing and notifications — if it's repetitive, I can automate it.
agents.deliverable: Working agents, documentation, and a handover session
agents.audience: Dev teams and businesses with repetitive processes

workshops.title: Team Workshops
workshops.description: Half-day hands-on training for your team. We cover prompt engineering, AI code editors, agent workflows, and how to actually ship with AI — not just talk about it.

studyGroup.title: AI Study Group
studyGroup.description: A free community where we learn AI together. Weekly Friday streams on Twitch, recorded on YouTube, with a Telegram group for ongoing discussion.
studyGroup.deliverable: Weekly live streams, YouTube recordings, Telegram community
studyGroup.audience: Developers and AI-curious people who want to learn together

services.ctaTitle: Not sure which is right for you?
services.ctaDescription: Book a free call and I'll point you in the right direction.

seo.homeDesc: Fullstack developer and AI engineer based in Munich. Building community platforms, AI tools, and open-source projects. Vue.js, Nuxt, Firebase, LangChain, Claude.
seo.aboutDesc: Senior fullstack developer in Munich. 15+ years building web apps with Vue.js, Nuxt, and AI. Creator of WeDance community platform. Open-source contributor.
seo.projectsDesc: Web applications, AI-powered tools, and community platforms built by Alex Razbakov. Vue.js, Nuxt, Firebase, LangChain. Open-source and client work.
seo.blogDesc: Articles on AI integration, multi-agent systems, Vue.js, Nuxt, community platforms, and building products as a solo developer. By Alex Razbakov.
seo.cvDesc: Senior Fullstack Developer in Munich — 15+ years experience with Vue.js, Nuxt, Firebase, AI integration (LangChain, Claude). Available for projects and consulting.
seo.servicesDesc: AI consulting services by Alex Razbakov: workflow audits, custom AI agents, team workshops, and a free AI study group. Based in Munich.
seo.talksDesc: Conference talks and presentations by Alex Razbakov on AI agents, multi-agent systems, Vue.js, and modern web development.
